course.title: Plan your date course
course.subtitle: Pick the steps and preferences, and we'll suggest a course that fits.

steps.label: Course steps
steps.hint: Arrange two to four steps in the order you want.

pin.locationFirstBody: Pick a location under "Where are you meeting?" below, and you can search for places nearby.

budget.label: Budget per person (KRW, optional)
budget.hint: Enter the budget per person, up to KRW 100,000.

additional.label: Additional request (optional)
additional.placeholder: e.g. Suggest a cafe with a great atmosphere for a date

validation.location_required: Select where your date should start.
validation.step_count_invalid: Build a course with two to four steps.
validation.duplicate_step_ids: Two course steps have the same identifier. Please reopen this screen.
validation.invalid_step_category: One of the course steps is not supported.
validation.budget_invalid: The budget per person must be a number from KRW 1 to 10,000,000.
validation.additional_request_too_long: Keep the additional request to 500 characters or fewer.
validation.exclusion_conflict: Your selected steps conflict with an exclusion: {{categories}}. Edit the text or the steps.

accessibility.budget: Enter the per-person budget in Korean won
